expectations.text: Applies ADDED requirements to main specs
expectations.evidence: Would append new requirement entries to relevant sections in main spec.
Would find matching requirement by ID and overwrite only that entry; leave surrounding entries untouched.
Careful approach: 'only delete entries that appear verbatim in the REMOVED section' — would not infer deletions or delete whole sections.

expectations.text: Preserves existing content not mentioned in delta
expectations.evidence: 'The delta is a change set, not a replacement. Anything in the main spec not referenced stays exactly as-is.'
